content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1580: Soul attack!

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Billions of five-colored flames moved with their own consciousness outside the Grace Mainland. The Grace Mainland was now a massive burning globe that was pulled out of the holy land of the Cloud Tribe. The warriors around could see it clearly.

Many warriors from different clans were watching the event from very far away. Still, they could feel the heat and the changing of their territory.

The weather in Cloud Mist Territory was a little cool like the perpetual autumn. It never felt as hot as a normal summer here.

At this moment, as the massive fireball was hung up, the temperature of the entire territory rose. The warriors living in this territory felt like they were living on a sunny day.

They used their soul to sense and then float up in the sky to observe.

They saw a massive fireball float up from the Cloud Tribe’s holy land. It continuously radiated dazzling light and scorching heat. It naturally attracted many experts.

Right after that, they saw the seven-colored divine light cover the entire Cloud Mist Territory. The area was blooming beautifully and brilliantly.

They recognized that this territory changed greatly. Many people proactively gathered by Ming Hao and Xuan He. They wanted to know what was going on over there.

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!

Billions of magnificent lights shot out from Zi Yao’s graceful body and zoomed everywhere. Those bands of light locked the entire sky as if they were an extremely large net in the sky. No warrior or creature could intrude this area.

As Grace Mainland was still rising, the flames burned more fiercely. Shi Yan let his soul altar emerg, both of his souls gazing at the continent.

“Break!”

Shi Yan’s host soul sent a thought that connected to his Absolute Beginning body and created a giant cross saber. That sharp saber then dashed toward Grace Mainland.

Crack! Crack! Crack!

Grace Mainland crackled fiercely. The giant fireball was torn apart and it released immense, thick energy.

However, at this moment, Shi Yan’s co-soul suddenly flew up and turned into a jet of light that entered the big crack on the continent to reach its nucleus. Shi Yan’s soul altar returned to his head. The savage Absolute Beginning body suddenly had furious and intimidating energy. His muscles bulged like mountains. Suns, moons, and stars moved in his eyes and energy gathered on his hands.

It looked like he was holding a brilliant galaxy in his hands with so many twinkling stars. The mysterious, complicated starlight fell on the burning globe right after that.

Boom! Boom! Boom!

Waves of energy rippled. Shi Yan’s giant Absolute Beginning body grew bigger. He was now even more terrifying than the suns or moons.

His colossal body suddenly lay down deep in the sea of clouds. His hands gestured and guided so many galaxies. The starlight materialized into chains and shackled Grace Mainland, pulling it toward his chest.

The onlookers then pulled themselves together to watch the event, their faces in disbelief. Many low-realm, shallow warriors couldn’t help but scream.

Grace Mainland was now on Shi Yan’s chest like a fire rubber ball. Compared to his body, it was so small that Shi Yan could hold it. It looked like he was holding a burning ball, which was really incredible to the eyes.

While the others were watching him in fear, Shi Yan used both hands to clutch that burning planet. The surging energy in his body was like a flood breaking the dam that frantically gushed into the center of the planet.

Although the continent was burning, the water in the Endless Sea didn’t evaporate. From an extinct volcano in the Heavenly Monster Mountain Range, the Origin’s magical energy emerged. Shi Yan’s co-soul flew and got in there to enter the deepest location of the planet to explore the place contained the Origin...

The core of Grace Mainland was a wonderful land with dazzling starlight and thick earth and heaven energy.

This place had so many mountains connected to each other as if they didn’t have an end...

That long mountain range suddenly began to move unknowingly. At first glance, it was like a dragon lying on the ground. At this moment, the dragon was wiggling frighteningly.

That unceasing mountain range became lively like a living creature or a part of a giant creature that was still dormant. Because of the massive change on the surface of the planet and the heavenly flames’ stimulation, this body part awakened. It began to twist as its instinct was to unite with the body.

It was like the case of Zi Yao’s snakes. No matter how long they slept or wherever they were, when they woke up, their instinct was to guide them back to Zi Yao, the master.

It was a basic instinct that no one could erase.

At this moment, the mountain range twisted and wiggled, trying to escape this area to unite with the host body.

Swish!

All of a sudden, Shi Yan’s co-soul appeared. He watched the extremely long mountain range and released the energy of the Origin. This sort of energy made Desolate’s part feel familiar. The wiggling part slowly calmed down.

At the same time, by the barriers of Cloud Mist Territory, earth-destroying energy barged in. The angry roar from the dawn of this world crossed the borderless spaces to hit on that space barrier.

BOOM!

Hiro of the White Bone Clan had cast a metal sea right there after gathering the metal energy from the three adjacent planets. He had created a barrier outside the territory wall. At this moment, as his barrier was impacted, a massive flow of energy from the wild beast violently hit the barrier and sent Hiro away.

Hiro’s bone body was as beautiful as crystal, flawless white gems. However, after that attack, his magnificent jade-like body had so many hair-lined cracks!

He discolored in fear and watched the metal sea bewildered. He was horror-struck, indeed.

“He got it!”

Right at this moment, Zi Yao screamed as if she was facing her arch enemy. Billions of light bands shot from her body and turned into beautiful cotton clouds covering Hiro. Rivers of divine lights flew towards and supported Hero to deal with Desolate’s attack.

All the experts gathered in Cloud Mist Territory including Montecie, Han Tian, Judy, Dragon Lizard, Mei Ji, and Gay discolored, their faces extremely stern.

They saw the cracks on Hiro’s body!

Among the seven clans, the White Bone Clan had a tenacious body that was actually extreme; it was the closest to the Absolute Beginning body. Hiro was at Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, but his body was cracked after just a hit.

How intimidating and fierce was it?

“We’re so many spaces away and he doesn’t know Space power Upanishad. I’m sure he can’t appear here with his body. However, he can track down the coordinates of his soul clones. He can use his soul power, Soul Consciousness, and God power to barge into the territory space barrier. He won’t allow Shi Yan to melt his body. He’ll attack us furiously. Get yourself together! We must try our best to defend!” screamed Zi Yao.

Billions of rainbow bands shot out from her eyes and reached where Hiro was protecting to mend it.

Rumble! Rumble!

Another wave of brutal impact shelled on that barrier and deformed it like when a hammer pounded on a rubber ball.

Without the divine light energy strengthening and mending the barrier, that territory barrier was going to break shortly, which would allow Desolate’s Soul Consciousness and soul energy to enter Cloud Mist Territory and kill Shi Yan.

Zi Yao turned into a jet of divine light and tried her best to protect that section of the barrier. She released so many bands of divine lights to resist Desolate’s power.

As Han Tian and the others saw the situation, they hurried to go there and help Zi Yao.

Zi Yao yelled hastily, “Protect your spots! Do not leave your positions. He’s using Dark Energy to attack. He can aim at any section of the territory barrier. Take care of your section. Do not come here!”

Her voice woke them up. They didn’t dare to leave their spots but gathered their God power and released their best abilities to create and strengthen their barriers.

Hiro getting hit hard made them not look down on Desolate any more. Although his body wasn’t here, he had used his Soul power to attack Hiro. Hiro’s body almost exploded. Desolate’s competence was beyond Yuan Zu!

Thump! Thump!

Forefather Dragon Lizard’s heart beat frantically. He drove the lava from a volcano underneath. Sending his Soul Consciousness to the lava, he made it a burning barrier to improve his section of the barrier.

From his Ancestor Lizard’s memories, he knew about Desolate’s power vaguely. He didn’t dare to relax, anyway. He had accumulated all energy to resist Desolate’s impact.

All of a sudden, his body shook hard. He looked at the space barrier by him and felt like he was watching a strange sea with many power Upanishads moving around...

It was a sea with so many jets of light weaving with each other. If Shi Yan was here, he would have known that it was the fountainhead of power Upanishads. He had to use the heaven flames as the key to enter a long time ago. At this moment, that fountainhead of power Upanishads appeared in the void and attracted Forefather Dragon Lizard.

Forefather Dragon’s consciousness became blurry as his soul was about to be sucked and attracted to that fountainhead to search the ultimate features of power Upanishads.

“Don’t get in there!”

However, at this moment, Audrey’s cold voice arose, which was like a sharp sword that thrusted into Forefather Dragon Lizard’s head.

He felt a twinge in his nerves that made him sober instantly. He was frightened as he knew that his soul was intruded. He had almost destroyed himself.

Boom! Boom! Boom!

Three horrible impacts came from the space barrier. Three flows of furious energy broke the lava barrier. Although they were subsided getting through the burning barrier, they still made their way to hit Dragon Lizard.

Just like Hiro, Forefather Dragon Lizard was like a rubber ball kicked far away. He rolled toward the deep clouds and bled terribly.
